---
title: "Projects"
---

::: {.page-title}
Selected project articles and case studies across NLP, smart-city forecasting, and CRM strategy. Each case study focuses on the business problem, analytical approach, and practical takeaway.
:::

```{=html}
<section class="ark-section project-index">
  <div class="ark-container">
    <div class="ark-projects">
      <a class="ark-project-card reveal-block" href="project-bert-genai.html">
        <img src="../images/project2.png" alt="Abstract dashboard-style visual representing NLP sentiment analysis and model comparison">
        <div>
          <span>Sentiment Analysis / NLP</span>
          <h3>BERT vs Generative AI</h3>
          <p>A business-focused comparison of transformer fine-tuning and zero-shot LLM workflows for sentiment analysis, framed around customer service escalation and content curation.</p>
        </div>
      </a>

      <a class="ark-project-card reveal-block" href="project-gorey.html">
        <img src="../images/project1.png" alt="Smart-city analytics visual representing traffic forecasting and air pollution prediction">
        <div>
          <span>Smart City / Forecasting</span>
          <h3>Traffic &amp; Air Pollution Prediction</h3>
          <p>A smart-city forecasting project using IoT sensor and weather data to support proactive traffic and public-health decision-making in Gorey.</p>
        </div>
      </a>

      <a class="ark-project-card reveal-block" href="project-fai-crm.html">
        <img src="../images/logo.png" alt="SB Analytics logo used for the FAI fan growth and CRM strategy case study">
        <div>
          <span>CRM / Sports Strategy</span>
          <h3>The Fan Growth Engine</h3>
          <p>A data-driven CRM strategy for improving fan retention, lifecycle engagement, and long-term supporter value in Irish football.</p>
        </div>
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```
